text.title: django-quality-linting Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does this check run in < 1 second on changed files only?

branch.conclusion: stage="commit", fast=true. Examples: ruff, ruff-format, mypy on changed files, manage.py check.

branch.question: Does the check need the FULL diff or DB / network access?

branch.conclusion: CI only. Examples: mypy --strict on entire apps/, ruff check on full repo, manage.py check --deploy, pip-audit.
CI only. Examples: pytest, integration tests, security scans.
stage="push", fast=false. Examples: full pytest before push.

text.example: check=ruff check on changed files q-fast -> true (~100ms) => conclusion r3-pre-commit: stage=commit, fast=true.
